[Moderate] Special Weather Statement: Special Weather Statement issued May 29 at 5:25AM EDT by NWS Gaylord MI — The combination of drying fuels, low relative humidity values, and gusty winds will result in elevated fire danger conditions across northern lower Michigan today.
